title: Daily Briefing: Trump sinks to record low approval
shortDescription: New poll shows dip in Americans' support amid strikes in Iran. Here is the news to know on Wednesday.

title: Trump sends Iran a peace plan as paratroops dispatched to Middle East
shortDescription: A source with knowledge of the matter described items on the 15-point peace plan as demands Iran must meet in order to end the war.

title: GOP loses House seat in Trump's district. What does it mean?
shortDescription: Emily Gregory defeated Trump-endorsed rival John Maples by just over 2 percentage points in a contest that drew 33,429 voters.

title: Trump's approval rating drops to record low because of Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating dropped to 36%, its lowest level since his return to the White House, according to a new Reuters/Ipsos poll.

title: With shutdown deal in sight, Dems say no-go without ICE reforms
shortDescription: Senate Democrats are cautiously optimistic about a potential agreement to fund the Department of Homeland Security. But it's far from a done deal.

title: Delta suspends special perks for members of Congress
shortDescription: As the partial government shutdown continues, Delta Air Lines said on March 24 that it was suspending special services for members of Congress.

title: Amid push to end mail-in ballots, Trump still votes by mail
shortDescription: The president has made passage of his SAVE Act, which would curtail mail-in voting, a major priority.

title: Trump vowed to end vote by mail. But he did it in a Florida election
shortDescription: President Donald Trump used absentee voting in a special election in Florida. He has vowed to end mail-in voting and called it “mail-in cheating.”

title: 'Make this one for Jesus': Trump tells GOP to pass SAVE act before Easter
shortDescription: Trump told congressional Republicans to work through their upcoming two-week Easter break to pass the SAVE voting act "for Jesus."

title: Trump says the US is talking with Iran
shortDescription: President Trump said Iran agreed to "never" have a nuclear weapon.

title: Trump calls for voter ID push 'for Jesus'
shortDescription: President Trump pressed Republicans to link voter ID and Homeland Security funding, telling them to make the vote "for Jesus."

title: Crowded CA governor race could open door for Republicans
shortDescription: Democrats are suddenly facing an unlikely but unpleasant possibility: getting locked out of the general election this fall.

title: Is ICE at Philly airport? Trump, DHS won't confirm airport security
shortDescription: Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents have been spotting at airports and TSA security queues across the country. Here's what DHS won't confirm.
